description_long: This is a pair of rectangular sunglasses featuring a full-rim frame with a woodgrain texture, giving it a natural and stylish appearance. The frame is moderately thick, providing both durability and a bold aesthetic, while the temples are gently curved for a comfortable fit around the ears. The lenses are large, dark, and opaque, offering substantial coverage and protection from sunlight. The bridge is a simple, integrated design that smoothly connects the two lenses without any visible nose pads. The temples are straight with a slight downward curve at the ends, and the woodgrain pattern continues seamlessly along their length. No visible brand logo or embellishments are present, emphasizing a minimalist and organic design.
description: Rectangular sunglasses with a woodgrain full-rim frame and large, dark lenses. The design is bold, natural, and minimalist, with no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular shape, full-rim woodgrain frame, and large, dark lenses.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the frame and the gentle curve of the temples.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the straight temples and the continuous woodgrain pattern across the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the temple's curve and frame thickness.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with moderate thickness and a bold, straight-lined geometry. The frame has a continuous, seamless structure with no visible embellishments or cutouts.
attribute_lens_tint: Opaque black tint with no visible gradient or special effects; the lenses appear fully dark and non-transparent.
attribute_bridge_style: Simple, integrated bridge with a straight, solid connection between the lenses and no visible nose pads or additional support structures.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are straight with a gentle downward curve at the ends, featuring a continuous woodgrain pattern and moderate thickness, with no engravings or decorative elements.
